trustBatch._comment: Trust badges section used in app/components/TrustBatch.tsx
trustBatch.title: Care you can trust for Hajj & Umrah
trustBatch.description: From Ihram-safe formulas to halal-certified standards, Sai brings together everything you need for comfortable, confident personal care throughout your pilgrimage.

items.label: Alcohol & Fragrance-Free
items.description: Formulated without alcohol or added perfumes. Gentle on skin and suitable for Ihram, prayer, and sensitive routines during pilgrimage.

hover.label: Cruelty-Free
hover.description: Never tested on animals. Ethically made with compassion at every stage of production and care.

items.label: Vegan
items.description: Crafted without animal-derived ingredients for conscious care. A thoughtful choice for everyday comfort on your Hajj and Umrah journey.

hover.label: Dermatologically Tested
hover.description: Rigorously tested under dermatological supervision. Gentle, effective formulas suited for daily pilgrimage use.

items.label: Halal
items.description: Developed in line with halal principles and trusted standards. Gives you reliable, worry-free personal care throughout your sacred journey.

hover.label: Travel-Friendly
hover.description: Compact, reliable, and easy to pack. Perfect companions for long flights, hotels, and life on the move.

items.label: Ihram-Safe
items.description: Designed to meet Ihram requirements at every step of pilgrimage. Stay comfortable and confident from travel to daily sacred rituals.

hover.label: Hot Climate Conditions
hover.description: Made to perform in heat and humidity. Keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable in demanding climates.

products.title: Skincare crafted with care
products.description: Explore our collection of premium formulas, each designed to deliver comfort, confidence, and visible results.

kit.name: German Care Complete Kit
kit.description: Everything you need for Hajj and Umrah in one kit. Anti-chafing cream for long walks in Ihram, a fragrance-free deodorant for daily freshness, SPF 50+ sunblock for the intense sun, and a gentle shampoo to refresh after hot, tiring days of travel.

keyBenefits: Complete Hajj and Umrah care in one travel-ready kit
All products are fragrance-free and Ihram-safe
Designed for long walking, heat, and daily freshness
Made in Germany with dermatologically tested formulas
details.howToUse: Use each product as directed on its packaging throughout your pilgrimage. Apply sunblock before outdoor rituals, use anti-chafing cream before long walks, refresh with deodorant and shampoo daily as needed.

ingredients.name: Daily Use Shampoo – Fragrance-Free
ingredients.list: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Maris Sal, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Niacinamide, Panthenol, Xylitylglucoside, Anhydroxylitol, Sodium Benzoate, Coco-Glucoside, Citric Acid, Glyceryl Oleate, Xylitol, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Glucose, Hydrogenated Vegetable Glycerides Citrate, Tocopherol, Lecithin, Ascorbyl Palmitate.

ingredients.name: Deodorant Roller – Fragrance-Free
ingredients.list: Aqua, Pentylene Glycol, Distarch Phosphate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Cyclodextrin, 1,2-Heptanediol, Sodium Caproyl/Lauroyl Lactylate, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Caprylate, Xanthan Gum, Triethyl Citrate, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Ascorbyl Isostearate, Isostearic Acid, Ascorbic Acid.

ingredients.name: Sunblock SPF 50+ with Hyaluronic Acid
ingredients.list: Aqua, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Dibutyl Adipate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Diisopropyl Sebacate, Glycerin, Olus Oil, Polyglyceryl-6 Stearate, Pentylene Glycol, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Phenylbenzimidazole Sulfonic Acid, Tapioca Starch, Diethylhexyl Butamido Triazone, Disodium Phenyl Dibenzimidazole Tetrasulfonate, Arginine, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate, 1,2-Heptanediol, Hectorite, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Carrageenan, Polyglyceryl-6 Behenate, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Phytate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Glucose, Sodium Hyaluronate, Acetyl Glucosamine, Hyaluronic Acid, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Tremella Fuciformis (Snow Fungus) Sporocarp Extract, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate.

ingredients.name: Anti-Chafing Body Cream
ingredients.list: Aqua, Decyl Cocoate, Dimethicone, Glycerin, Pentylene Glycol, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Prunus Amygdalus (Sweet Almond) Dulcis Oil, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Niacinamide, 1,2-Heptanediol, Sodium Lactate, Sodium PCA, Panthenol, Xanthan Gum, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Glycine, Inositol, Lactic Acid, Urea, Tocopheryl Linoleate/Oleate, Citric Acid.

details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Read individual product labels before use. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Suitable for use during Ihram. Store in a cool, dry place while traveling.

items.name: Anti-Chafing Body Cream
items.description: Chafing protection cream for the body designed to reduce friction by forming a soft protective layer, moisturize the skin and help maintain comfort in areas that are prone to rubbing, such as between the thighs and under the arms. Recommended to use while walking or running especially in hot climates and for use during Ihram where long walks and prolonged skin contact may cause skin chafing and inflammation.

details.howToUse: Apply to clean, dry skin on friction-prone areas such as between the thighs and under the arms before walking or running. Especially recommended in hot climates and during Ihram, when long walks and prolonged skin contact may cause chafing and inflammation. Reapply as needed during extended activity.
details.ingredients: Aqua, Decyl Cocoate, Dimethicone, Glycerin, Pentylene Glycol, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Prunus Amygdalus (Sweet Almond) Dulcis Oil, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Niacinamide, 1,2-Heptanediol, Sodium Lactate, Sodium PCA, Panthenol, Xanthan Gum, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Glycine, Inositol, Lactic Acid, Urea, Tocopheryl Linoleate/Oleate, Citric Acid.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Store at room temperature. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs.

items.name: Deodorant Roller – Fragrance-Free
items.description: Gentle daily deodorant for long-lasting comfort.

details.howToUse: Apply to clean, dry underarms. Reapply as needed.
details.ingredients: Aqua, Pentylene Glycol, Distarch Phosphate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Cyclodextrin, 1,2-Heptanediol, Sodium Caproyl/Lauroyl Lactylate, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Caprylate, Xanthan Gum, Triethyl Citrate, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Ascorbyl Isostearate, Isostearic Acid, Ascorbic Acid.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Do not apply to broken skin. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Keep out of reach of children.

items.name: Daily Use Shampoo – Fragrance-Free
items.description: Gentle hair and scalp cleansing. A gentle, fragrance-free shampoo designed for daily cleansing of hair and scalp. Ideal for Hajj and Umrah, as it contains no fragrance or essential oils. Suitable for sensitive users and frequent use. Leaves the hair feeling clean and soft.

details.howToUse: Apply to wet hair, massage gently, then rinse thoroughly. Repeat if needed.
details.ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Maris Sal, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Niacinamide, Panthenol, Xylitylglucoside, Anhydroxylitol, Sodium Benzoate, Coco-Glucoside, Citric Acid, Glyceryl Oleate, Xylitol, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Glucose, Hydrogenated Vegetable Glycerides Citrate, Tocopherol, Lecithin, Ascorbyl Palmitate.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Keep out of reach of children. Store at room temperature.

items.name: Sunblock SPF 50+ with Hyaluronic Acid
items.description: UV Protection. Moisturizing, lightweight, and fast absorbing. This formula contains 100% vegan raw materials and does not include any animal-derived ingredients.

details.howToUse: Apply generously before sun exposure and reapply regularly as needed. Using too little product reduces protection.
details.ingredients: Aqua, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Dibutyl Adipate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Diisopropyl Sebacate, Glycerin, Olus Oil, Polyglyceryl-6 Stearate, Pentylene Glycol, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Ethylhexyl Triazone, Phenylbenzimidazole Sulfonic Acid, Tapioca Starch, Diethylhexyl Butamido Triazone, Disodium Phenyl Dibenzimidazole Tetrasulfonate, Arginine, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate, 1,2-Heptanediol, Hectorite, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Carrageenan, Polyglyceryl-6 Behenate, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Phytate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Glucose, Sodium Hyaluronate, Acetyl Glucosamine, Hyaluronic Acid, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Tremella Fuciformis (Snow Fungus) Sporocarp Extract, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate.
details.safetyNotes: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Excessive sun exposure is a serious health risk. Protect babies and children from direct sunlight. Store at room temperature. Keep out of reach of children.

ourStory.title: Rooted in German care, built for everyday confidence
ourStory.description: Sai was founded on a simple belief. Everyone deserves access to high-quality skincare inspired by German standards of precision, safety, and care. From ingredient selection to final delivery, every step reflects our commitment to your well-being.

stats.description: Years of German-inspired skincare expertise and innovation.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Find quick and helpful answers about Sai Brand, our products, shipping, and everything you need to know for a smooth and confident shopping experience.

items.question: Is it alcohol-free?
items.answer: Yes. Every product in the Hajj & Umrah Personal Care Kit is formulated without alcohol for gentle, everyday use during pilgrimage.

items.question: Is it fragrance-free?
items.answer: Yes. The kit is completely fragrance-free with no added perfumes, making it suitable for Ihram, prayer, and sensitive routines.

items.question: Is it suitable for Ihram?
items.answer: Yes. Our formulas are developed to meet Ihram requirements, so you can care for yourself with confidence throughout Hajj and Umrah.

items.question: What is included?
items.answer: The complete kit includes Daily Use Shampoo, Deodorant Roller, Sunblock SPF 50+, and Anti-Chafing Body Cream — everything you need in one set.

items.question: Is it travel-friendly?
items.answer: Yes. The kit is compact, easy to pack, and designed for long journeys, hot climates, and life on the move during pilgrimage.

items.question: Is it made in Germany?
items.answer: Yes. Sai products are made in Germany, reflecting German standards of quality, precision, and care in every formula.

moreItems.question: How can I buy the SAI Hajj & Umrah Care Kit?
moreItems.answer: You can order directly through our website by visiting the Products section and selecting the complete kit. Follow the checkout steps to place your order securely.

moreItems.question: Is the kit available in GCC countries?
moreItems.answer: Yes, the kit is available in GCC countries. Shipping options and delivery times may vary depending on your location.

moreItems.question: Do you offer international shipping?
moreItems.answer: Yes, Sai Brand offers international shipping to selected regions worldwide, depending on availability and logistics coverage.

moreItems.question: Can I order the kit before traveling for Hajj or Umrah?
moreItems.answer: Yes, we recommend ordering ahead of your travel dates to ensure your kit arrives in time for preparation and packing.

moreItems.question: Is the kit available for wholesale or distributors?
moreItems.answer: Yes, wholesale and distribution opportunities are available. Please contact us for volume pricing and partnership details.

moreItems.question: What are the shipping options and delivery times?
moreItems.answer: Shipping options and delivery estimates depend on your location. Standard delivery typically ranges from a few business days to several weeks for international orders.

moreItems.question: Who can I contact for GCC distribution or partnership inquiries?
moreItems.answer: For GCC distribution, wholesale, or partnership inquiries, please contact us at support@saibrand.com or use the Contact Us button on this page.
